title: シンザン記念の後に・栄冠へRUN

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Another exciting race in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! Be it a sprint or a mile, you can
count on me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I get the feelin' I'll be winning a lot more from
here on out!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep racin' and racin' till I take home
the title of Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But before that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm throwin' a victory bash so good it'll make your
head spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Yesterday's race and party sure
were a hoot, weren't they?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, where should I run next? Whatever the race,
I'll ace it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We beat the odds to come out on top at the
Shinzan Kinen. Now we need to keep up this
momentum and take on bigger challenges!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Taiki wants the title of Umamusume of the
Year, being selected for a URA award is a must.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering her skillset, she'll need to at least win
the Best Sprinter Award, the true pinnacle of mile
and sprint races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On that note, the race that crowns the classic
King of the Mile is coming up...
choice_data_list: Let's go to the NHK Mile Cup!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That's a G1 race, ain't it?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! Now there's a fun race—filled to the brim with plenty of strong Umamusume! It's already got my heart pounding!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty then—let's get to partyin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, Trainer. You've got it all wrong.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
See, yesterday's shindig was for the end of the
Shinzan Kinen! Today, I'm celebratin' my new
goal!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now that we're on the same page...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We gotta go buy some big cuts of beef for the
main roast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide on the NHK Mile Cup, the race
that crowns the King of the Mile for the classic
year.
